questions.question: How much does commercial photography cost in St. Augustine?
questions.answer: Event coverage starts at $1,200 for half-day (4 hours) with 100+ edited images. Commercial photography starts at $1,500 for a half-day shoot with 40+ images. Product photoshoots for lifestyle brands and apparel start at $4,500 for a full day. All sessions include edited, high-resolution images delivered digitally.

questions.question: What types of photography does First Sight Films offer?
questions.answer: We focus on commercial photography: apparel & lifestyle, product (including clean white-background e-commerce stills), brand & team, and architectural/interior. We shoot the merchandise lines for the St. Augustine Amphitheatre, Ponte Vedra Concert Hall, and Sing Out Loud, plus brand and architectural work across Northeast Florida.

questions.question: What makes First Sight Films different from other photographers?
questions.answer: We run real productions, not just a camera — art direction, production design, multi-look planning, and a pre-shoot site visit when it's needed. You get full usage rights, and we plan around where the images will actually be used so they work in every channel.

questions.question: Do you provide models for apparel and lifestyle shoots?
questions.answer: You can bring your own models, or we'll source and coordinate them for an additional $50–120 per hour per model, depending on their experience. The Amphitheatre's Fall/Winter line ran 7 models across two days.

questions.question: Do you handle art direction and production?
questions.answer: Yes. Larger shoots get an art director, production designer, and on-set crew, plus a pre-shoot site visit so looks and locations are locked before the day.

questions.question: Do you shoot in a studio or on location?
questions.answer: Both. We shoot on location — venues, state parks, downtown St. Augustine — and we shoot clean studio-style product stills (we'll rent a studio space when a shoot calls for it). Often both in one production.

questions.question: Do you shoot white-background product photos for e-commerce?
questions.answer: Yes — clean white-background stills built to drop straight into online-store and vendor listings (we do this for the Amphitheatre's store), plus styled in-field shots of the same products for social and catalogs.

questions.question: How quickly will I receive my photos?
questions.answer: Standard turnaround is within 72 hours for edited images delivered via online gallery. Faster delivery can be arranged when a launch date depends on it — just let us know up front.

questions.question: Who owns the photos and how can we use them?
questions.answer: You get full usage rights — a perpetual license across web, print, social, e-commerce, and vendor sites. First Sight Films retains ownership of the photographs. We deliver edited high-res images, not raw files.

questions.question: Are you insured, and can you provide a certificate of insurance?
questions.answer: Yes — we carry $1 million in general liability insurance and can provide a COI for your venue or property ahead of the shoot, including naming them as additional insured if required.

questions.question: Do you offer video and photography together?
questions.answer: Yes, we frequently combine photo and video coverage for events and brand projects. Bundling services is more efficient and cost-effective than hiring separate vendors.

questions.question: What areas do you serve for photography?
questions.answer: We're based in St. Augustine and serve clients throughout Northeast Florida, including Jacksonville, Ponte Vedra, St. Johns County, and Palm Coast. We also travel for larger projects — we've shot in national parks across the country.
